title: DOS requests comments on proposed revisions to Form DS-71, Affidavit of Identifying Witness
description_html:
The Department of State (DOS) issued a 60-day notice requesting public comment on proposed revisions to Form DS-71, Affidavit of Identifying Witness. The form is submitted in conjunction with a U.S. passport application when the applicant is unable to establish their identity to the satisfaction of the official reviewing the application.

Comments will be accepted for 60 days, until July 14, 2025.

Trump 2.0 [ID# 1749]

attachments.link_title: 2025.08.05 DOS - Proposed Information Collection: Affidavit of Identifying Witness
attachments.description_html:
The State Department posted a 30-day notice of request for public comments regarding revisions to Form DS-71, Affidavit of Identifying Witness, submitted in conjunction with applications for a U.S. passport.

Comments will be accepted for 30 days until September 4, 2025.

related_policies.title: DOS proposes changes to Form DS-11 (Application for a U.S. Passport), and will no longer issue passports with "X" sex markers
DOS proposes changes to Form DS-5504 (Application for a U.S. Passport for Eligible Individuals: Correction, Name Change to Passport) to no longer allow "X" gender marker
DOS proposes changes to DS-82 (U.S. Passport Renewal Application) to eliminate "X" gender marker from application
